auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Fixer API key used as the access_key query parameter. Get it from your Fixer dashboard: https://fixer.io/dashboard.

actions.name: get_historical_rates
actions.description: Retrieve historical Fixer exchange rates for a specific date.

date.description: Historical date to request from Fixer in YYYY-MM-DD format.

base.description: Three-letter base currency code for the returned rates.

items.description: A three-letter ISO currency code used to limit the response.

symbols.description: List of target currency codes to include in the Fixer response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching historical Fixer exchange rates.

success.description: Whether the Fixer request completed successfully.

historical.description: Whether the returned rates represent a historical snapshot.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the rates snapshot was generated.

base.description: Base currency used for the returned rates.

date.description: Date of the returned exchange rates in YYYY-MM-DD format.

rates.description: Mapping of currency codes to exchange rates for the selected base currency.

actions.name: get_latest_rates
actions.description: Retrieve the latest Fixer exchange rates for all or selected currencies.

base.description: Three-letter base currency code for the returned rates.

items.description: A three-letter ISO currency code used to limit the response.

symbols.description: List of target currency codes to include in the Fixer response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching the latest Fixer exchange rates.

success.description: Whether the Fixer request completed successfully.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the rates snapshot was generated.

base.description: Base currency used for the returned rates.

date.description: Date of the returned exchange rates in YYYY-MM-DD format.

rates.description: Mapping of currency codes to exchange rates for the selected base currency.

actions.name: get_supported_symbols
actions.description: Retrieve all supported Fixer currency symbols and their full names.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving all supported Fixer currency symbols.

success.description: Whether the Fixer request completed successfully.

symbols.description: Mapping of ISO currency codes to full currency names.
